scripts.format: bunx oxfmt --write apps/agent/src apps/edge/src apps/edge-tail/src apps/web/src packages/config/src packages/protocol/src packages/testkit/src apps/edge/wrangler.jsonc apps/edge-tail/wrangler.jsonc apps/web/vite.config.ts
scripts.format:check: bunx oxfmt --check apps/agent/src apps/edge/src apps/edge-tail/src apps/web/src packages/config/src packages/protocol/src packages/testkit/src apps/edge/wrangler.jsonc apps/edge-tail/wrangler.jsonc apps/web/vite.config.ts
scripts.typecheck: bun x tsc --noEmit -p packages/protocol/tsconfig.json && bun x tsc --noEmit -p packages/config/tsconfig.json && bun x tsc --noEmit -p packages/testkit/tsconfig.json && bun x tsc --noEmit -p apps/edge/tsconfig.json && bun x tsc --noEmit -p apps/edge-tail/tsconfig.json && bun x tsc --noEmit -p apps/agent/tsconfig.json && bun x tsc --noEmit -p apps/web/tsconfig.json
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test
